H4500.strongs_def: a yoke (properly, for plowing), i.e. the frame of aloom

H4501.derivation: or מְנֹרָה; feminine of H4500 (מָנוֹר) (in the original sense of H5216 (נִיר));

H4503.derivation: from an unused root meaning to apportion, i.e. bestow;
H4503.strongs_def: a donation; euphemistically, tribute; specifically a sacrificial offering (usually bloodless and voluntary)
H4503.usage: offering(164x), present(28x), gift(7x), oblation(6x), sacrifice(5x), meat(1x)

H4506.strongs_def: Manachath, the name of an Edomite and of a place in Moab
H4506.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H4507.strongs_def: the Apportioner, i.e. Fate (as an idol)

H4509.derivation: from H4480 (מִן) and H3225 (יָמִין); from (the) right hand;
H4509.strongs_def: Minjamin, the name of two Israelites

H4511.derivation: from the same as H4482 (מֵן); enumeration;
H4511.strongs_def: Minnith, a place East of the Jordan

H4513.strongs_def: to debar (negatively or positively) from benefit or injury
H4513.usage: withhold(18x), refrain(2x), denied(1x), deny(1x), hinder(1x), keep(1x), restrained(1x)

H4517.strongs_def: a sistrum (so called from its rattling sound)

H4519.strongs_def: Menashsheh, a grandson of Jacob, also the tribe descended from him, and its territory

H4520.strongs_def: a Menashshite or descendant of Menashsheh

H4521.strongs_def: an allotment (by courtesy, law or providence)

H4522.strongs_def: properly, a burden (as causing to faint), i.e. a tax in the form of forced labor

H4524.derivation: plural masculine מְסִבִּים; or feminine מְסִבּוֹת; from H5437 (סָבַב);
H4524.strongs_def: a divan (as enclosing the room); abstractly (adverbial) around
H4524.kjv_def: that compass about, (place) round about, at table.

H4525.strongs_def: a fastener, i.e. (of a person) a smith, (of a thing) a prison

H4526.strongs_def: something enclosing, i.e. a margin (of a region, of a panel); concretely, a stronghold

H4528.strongs_def: a colonnade or internal portico (from its rows of pillars)

H4529.kjv_def: make to consume away, (make to) melt, water.

H4530.derivation: from H4549 (מָסַס) (in the sense of flowing);

H4531.strongs_def: a testing, of men (judicial) or of God (querulous)

H4532.strongs_def: Massah, a place in the Desert

H4533.derivation: apparently from an unused root meaning to cover;

H4535.derivation: from H5255 (נָסַח) in the sense of staving off;
H4535.strongs_def: a cordon, (adverbially) or (as a) military barrier

H4538.strongs_def: a mixture, i.e. of wine with spices

H4541.strongs_def: properly, a pouring over, i.e. fusion of metal (especially a cast image); by implication, a libation, i.e. league; concretely a coverlet (as if poured out)

H4545.derivation: from H5259 (נָסַךְ) in the sense of spreading out;
H4545.strongs_def: something expanded, i.e. the warp in aloom (as stretched out to receive the woof)

H4546.strongs_def: a thoroughfare (as turnpiked), literally or figuratively; specifically a viaduct, a staircase
H4546.usage: highway(19x), causeway(2x), path(2x), way(2x), courses(1x), terraces(1x)

H4548.derivation: or מִסְמֵר; also (feminine) מַסְמְרָה; or מִסְמְרָה; or even מַשְׂמְרָה; (Ecclesiastes 12:11), from H5568 (סָמַר);
H4548.strongs_def: a peg (as bristling from the surface)

H4549.strongs_def: to liquefy; figuratively, to waste (with disease), to faint (with fatigue, fear or grief)
H4549.kjv_def: discourage, faint, be loosed, melt (away), refuse, [idiom] utterly.
H4549.usage: melt(13x), faint(2x), discouraged(1x), loosed(1x), molten(1x), refuse(1x), utterly(1x)

H4550.strongs_def: a departure (from striking the tents), i.e. march (not necessarily a single day's travel); by implication, a station (or point of departure)

H4551.derivation: from H5265 (נָסַע) in the sense of projecting;
H4551.strongs_def: a missile (spear or arrow); also a quarry (whence stones are, as it were, ejected)

H4554.derivation: from an unused root meaning to collect;

H4557.strongs_def: a number, definite (arithmetical) or indefinite (large, innumerable; small, a few); also (abstractly) narration
H4557.kjv_def: [phrase] abundance, account, [idiom] all, [idiom] few, (in-) finite, (certain) number(-ed), tale, telling, [phrase] time.
H4557.usage: number(110x), few(6x), all(3x), innumerable(3x), sum(2x), time(2x), account(1x), infinite(1x), numbered(1x), tale(1x), telling(1x)

H4560.strongs_def: to sunder, i.e. (transitively) set apart, or (reflex.) apostatize

H4564.strongs_def: properly, a hider, i.e. (abstractly) a hiding, i.e. aversion

H4565.strongs_def: properly, a concealer, i.e. a covert

H4568.strongs_def: properly, compact (part of soil), i.e. loam

H4569.strongs_def: a crossing-place (of a river, a ford; of a mountain, a pass); abstractly, a transit, i.e. (figuratively) overwhelming

H4570.derivation: or feminine מַעְגָּלָה; from the same as H5696 (עָגֹל);
H4570.strongs_def: a track (literally or figuratively); also a rampart (as circular)

H4573.derivation: from H5710 (עָדָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); ornament of Jah;

H4577.derivation: (Aramaic) or מְעָא; (Aramaic), corresponding to H4578 (מֵעֶה)xlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh;

H4578.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to be soft;
H4578.strongs_def: used only in plural the intestines, or (collectively) the abdomen, figuratively, sympathy; by implication, a vest; by extension the stomach, the uterus (or of men, the seat of generation), the heart (figuratively)

H4579.derivation: feminine of H4578 (מֵעֶה)xlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh;

H4580.derivation: from H5746 (עוּג); also with H3934 (לָעֵג) a table-buffoon, i.e.

H4581.derivation: (also מָעוּז ); or מָעֹז (also מָעֻז; from H5810 (עָזַז);
H4581.strongs_def: a fortified place; figuratively, a defence
H4581.kjv_def: force, fort(-ress), rock, strength(-en), ([idiom] most) strong (hold).
H4581.usage: strength(24x), strong(4x), fortress(3x), hold(2x), forces(1x), fort(1x), rock(1x), strengthen(1x)

H4583.derivation: or מָעִין; (1 Chronicles 4:41), from the same as H5772 (עוֹנָה);
H4583.strongs_def: an abode, of God (the Tabernacle or the Temple), men (their home) or animals (their lair); hence, a retreat (asylum)

H4584.derivation: the same as H4583 (מָעוֹן); a residence;
H4584.strongs_def: Maon, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine
H4584.kjv_def: Maon, Maonites. Compare H1010 (בֵּית בַּעַל מְעוֹן), H4586 (מְעוּנִי)lemma מְעוּנָי third vowel, corrected to מְעוּנִי.
H4584.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H4585.derivation: or מְעֹנָה; feminine of H4583 (מָעוֹן), and meaning the same
H4585.strongs_def: {an abode, of God (the Tabernacle or the Temple), men (their home) or animals (their lair); hence, a retreat (asylum)}

H4586.derivation: or מְעִינִי; probably patrial from H4584 (מָעוֹן);
H4586.strongs_def: a Meunite, or inhabitant of Maon (only in plural)

H4588.derivation: from H5774 (עוּף) in the sense of covering with shade (compare H4155 (מוּעָף));

H4590.derivation: or מַעַזְיָהוּ; probably from H5756 (עוּז) (in the sense of protection) and H3050 (יָהּ); rescue of Jah;
H4590.strongs_def: Maazjah, the name of two Israelites

H4591.strongs_def: properly, to pare off, i.e. lessen; intransitively, to be (or causatively, to make) small or few (or figuratively, ineffective)
H4591.kjv_def: suffer to decrease, diminish, (be, [idiom] borrow a, give, make) few (in number, -ness), gather least (little), be (seem) little, ([idiom] give the) less, be minished, bring to nothing.
H4591.usage: diminish(5x), few(4x), less(4x), little(3x), fewness(1x), least(1x), minished(1x), decrease(1x), nothing(1x)

H4592.strongs_def: a little or few (often adverbial or compar.)
H4592.kjv_def: almost (some, very) few(-er, -est), lightly, little (while), (very) small (matter, thing), some, soon, [idiom] very.
H4592.usage: little(49x), few(23x), while(6x), almost(5x), small(3x), some(2x), matter(2x), soon(2x), fewer(1x), fewest(1x), lightly(1x), very(1x), worth(1x)

H4593.strongs_def: thinned (as to the edge), i.e. sharp

H4596.strongs_def: a pile of rubbish (as contorted), i.e. a ruin

H4597.derivation: probably from H4578 (מֵעֶה)xlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh; sympathetic;

H4598.derivation: from H4603 (מָעַל) in the sense of covering;
H4598.strongs_def: a robe (i.e. upper and outer garment)

H4599.derivation: or מַעְיְנוֹ; (Psalm 114:8), or (feminine) מַעְיָנָה; from H5869 (עַיִן) (as a denominative in the sense of a spring);
H4599.strongs_def: a fountain (also collectively), figuratively, a source (of satisfaction)
